title: Science and innovation
explanation:
Science and innovation

  • experiment, discovery, evidence, theory, invention
  • research, analyse, observe, develop
  • phrases: come to a conclusion, carry out research

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The team carried out an ____ to test the new material. | *experiment | agreement | refund
Scientists need strong ____ before making claims. | *evidence | campaign | agenda
Researchers continue to ____ how the disease spreads. | *investigate | broadcast | persuade
That medical ____ could save millions of lives. | *discovery | argument | customs
questions.feedback: A discovery is a new finding.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: The company wants to ____ a cheaper battery. | develop
Please ____ the data before writing the report. | analyse
Astronomers ____ the sky through powerful telescopes. | observe
The article explains a scientific ____ about climate systems. | theory
He plans to ____ further research next year. | conduct

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The telephone was once a revolutionary ____. | *invention | promotion | device update
questions.feedback: An invention is a new thing created.

questions.text: They work in a modern ____ at the university. | *laboratory | headline | terminal
After studying the results, they came to a clear ____. | *conclusion | summary | deadline
Good science depends on careful ____. | *research | journey | opinion
